title: 3000 characters limit (or more) custom AI prompt within automations
excerpt:
There is a new limit for 3000 characters within the Fill with AI functionality on columns, but it isn’t released within automations. 
I can’t ‘only’ trigger filling in with AI another way which makes the filling with AI …

posts.author: Sharif (Sharif Sediqui)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is a new limit for 3000 characters within the Fill with AI functionality on columns, but it isn’t released within automations.

I can’t ‘only’ trigger filling in with AI another way which makes the filling with AI still unusable for many use cases.
